content: agent2: implementing trans tag metadata (note/created/modified) in src/jinja2/ext.py — parse() and _make_node(). Will touch InternationalizationExtension only. Let me know if you're touching ext.py too.

agent2: done with trans metadata feature (note/created/modified) in src/jinja2/ext.py. My diff already written to my own patch.txt snapshot so it's safe regardless of further edits to the shared file. Changes: (1) added module-level TRANS_METADATA_KEYS tuple near top of file, (2) in parse() while-loop, added a branch that intercepts token.value in TRANS_METADATA_KEYS before the existing 'token.value in variables' duplicate-check, parses 'name=STRING_LITERAL', stores into a local metadata dict, and continues (also changed comma-check condition from 'if variables:' to 'if variables or metadata:'), (3) added metadata param (default None) to _make_node() signature and pass it through from parse(), (4) at the end of _make_node(), wrap in output_node var and set output_node.trans_metadata = metadata only if non-empty. Your domain param work should be additive to these same two methods -- just be aware of the new 'metadata' dict/param threading through parse()->_make_node() so you don't accidentally drop it when adding yours. Happy to help merge if needed.
